```swift
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# List media in folder

GET https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/{folderName}/media

Returns a paginated list of media items in the specified folder.

<Info>Scope required: `read:media`</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/list-vault-folder-media

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: List media in folder
  version: endpoint_.listVaultFolderMedia
paths:
  /vault/folders/{folderName}/media:
    get:
      operationId: list-vault-folder-media
      summary: List media in folder
      description: |-
        Returns a paginated list of media items in the specified folder.

        <Info>Scope required: `read:media`</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: folderName
          in: path
          description: Folder name (URL-encoded in path)
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: page
          in: query
          description: Page number to retrieve (starts from 1)
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 1
        - name: size
          in: query
          description: 'Number of items to return per page (1-50, default: 15)'
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 15
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of media in folder
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/listVaultFolderMedia_Response_200'
        '400':
          description: Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '404':
          description: Not Found Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
components:
  schemas:
    VaultFoldersFolderNameMediaGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        name:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date
        mediaType:
          type: string
      required:
        - uuid
        - name
        - createdAt
        - mediaType
    VaultFoldersFolderNameMediaGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        page:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Current page number
        size:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of records returned in this response
        hasMore:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether there are more items available on subsequent pages
      required:
        - page
        - size
        - hasMore
    listVaultFolderMedia_Response_200:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: >-
              #/components/schemas/VaultFoldersFolderNameMediaGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems
          description: Array of media items
        pagination:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/VaultFoldersFolderNameMediaGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination
          description: Pagination information
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript
const url = 'https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media';
const options = {
  method: 'GET',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer <token>'}
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```ruby
require 'uri'
require 'net/http'

url = URI("https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Get.new(url)
request["X-Fanvue-API-Version"] = '2025-06-26'
request["Authorization"] = 'Bearer <token>'

response = http.request(request)
puts response.read_body
```

```java
import com.mashape.unirest.http.HttpResponse;
import com.mashape.unirest.http.Unirest;

HttpResponse<String> response = Unirest.get("https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media")
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
  .header("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
  .asString();
```

```php
<?php
require_once('vendor/autoload.php');

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

$response = $client->request('GET', 'https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media', [
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version' => '2025-06-26',
  ],
]);

echo $response->getBody();
```

```csharp
using RestSharp;

var client = new RestClient("https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media");
var request = new RestRequest(Method.GET);
request.AddHeader("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26");
request.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer <token>");
IRestResponse response = client.Execute(request);
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "GET"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# Add media to folder

POST https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/{folderName}/media
Content-Type: application/json

Add one or more media items to the specified folder.
Media items must belong to the authenticated user.

<Info>Scope required: `write:media`</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/attach-media-to-vault-folder

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: Add media to folder
  version: endpoint_.attachMediaToVaultFolder
paths:
  /vault/folders/{folderName}/media:
    post:
      operationId: attach-media-to-vault-folder
      summary: Add media to folder
      description: |-
        Add one or more media items to the specified folder.
        Media items must belong to the authenticated user.

        <Info>Scope required: `write:media`</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: folderName
          in: path
          description: Folder name (URL-encoded in path)
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Media added to folder
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/attachMediaToVaultFolder_Response_201'
        '400':
          description: Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '404':
          description: Not Found Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                mediaUuids:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                    format: uuid
                  description: UUIDs of media items to attach to the folder
              required:
                - mediaUuids
components:
  schemas:
    attachMediaToVaultFolder_Response_201:
      type: object
      properties:
        addedCount:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of media items successfully added
      required:
        - addedCount

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media"

payload = { "mediaUuids": ["string"] }
headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

response = requests.post(url, json=payload, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript
const url = 'https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media';
const options = {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26',
    Authorization: 'Bearer <token>',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
  },
  body: '{"mediaUuids":["string"]}'
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"strings"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media"

	payload := strings.NewReader("{\n  \"mediaUuids\": [\n    \"string\"\n  ]\n}")

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", url, payload)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
	req.Header.Add("Content-Type", "application/json")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```ruby
require 'uri'
require 'net/http'

url = URI("https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(url)
request["X-Fanvue-API-Version"] = '2025-06-26'
request["Authorization"] = 'Bearer <token>'
request["Content-Type"] = 'application/json'
request.body = "{\n  \"mediaUuids\": [\n    \"string\"\n  ]\n}"

response = http.request(request)
puts response.read_body
```

```java
import com.mashape.unirest.http.HttpResponse;
import com.mashape.unirest.http.Unirest;

HttpResponse<String> response = Unirest.post("https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media")
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
  .header("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
  .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
  .body("{\n  \"mediaUuids\": [\n    \"string\"\n  ]\n}")
  .asString();
```

```php
<?php
require_once('vendor/autoload.php');

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

$response = $client->request('POST', 'https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media', [
  'body' => '{
  "mediaUuids": [
    "string"
  ]
}',
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',
    'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version' => '2025-06-26',
  ],
]);

echo $response->getBody();
```

```csharp
using RestSharp;

var client = new RestClient("https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media");
var request = new RestRequest(Method.POST);
request.AddHeader("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26");
request.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer <token>");
request.AddHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
request.AddParameter("application/json", "{\n  \"mediaUuids\": [\n    \"string\"\n  ]\n}", ParameterType.RequestBody);
IRestResponse response = client.Execute(request);
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>",
  "Content-Type": "application/json"
]
let parameters = ["mediaUuids": ["string"]] as [String : Any]

let postData = JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: parameters, options: [])

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "POST"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers
request.httpBody = postData as Data

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# Remove media from folder

DELETE https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/{folderName}/media/{mediaUuid}

Remove a media item from the specified folder.
The media item itself is not deleted, only the folder association.

<Info>Scope required: `write:media`</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/vault/detach-media-from-vault-folder

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: Remove media from folder
  version: endpoint_.detachMediaFromVaultFolder
paths:
  /vault/folders/{folderName}/media/{mediaUuid}:
    delete:
      operationId: detach-media-from-vault-folder
      summary: Remove media from folder
      description: |-
        Remove a media item from the specified folder.
        The media item itself is not deleted, only the folder association.

        <Info>Scope required: `write:media`</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: folderName
          in: path
          description: Folder name (URL-encoded in path)
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: mediaUuid
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Media removed from folder
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/detachMediaFromVaultFolder_Response_204'
        '400':
          description: Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '404':
          description: Not Found Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
components:
  schemas:
    detachMediaFromVaultFolder_Response_204:
      type: object
      properties: {}

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media/mediaUuid"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
}

response = requests.delete(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript
const url = 'https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media/mediaUuid';
const options = {
  method: 'DELETE',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer <token>'}
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media/mediaUuid"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("DELETE", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```java
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
  .header("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
  .asString();
```

```php
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',

  ],
]);

```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/vault/folders/folderName/media/mediaUuid")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)

request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers

  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# Get agency creators

GET https://api.fanvue.com/creators

Returns a paginated list of creators associated with the authenticated agency user's organization.

    <Info>Scope required: `read:creator`</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creators

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: Get agency creators
  version: endpoint_.listCreators
paths:
  /creators:
    get:
      operationId: list-creators
      summary: Get agency creators
      description: >-
        Returns a paginated list of creators associated with the authenticated
        agency user's organization.

            <Info>Scope required: `read:creator`</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: page
          in: query
          description: Page number to retrieve (starts from 1)
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 1
        - name: size
          in: query
          description: 'Number of items to return per page (1-50, default: 15)'
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 15
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of creators
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/listCreators_Response_200'
        '400':
          description: Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
components:
  schemas:
    CreatorsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        handle:
          type: string
        displayName:
          type: string
        nickname:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        isTopSpender:
          type: boolean
        avatarUrl:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        registeredAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        role:
          type: string
      required:
        - uuid
        - handle
        - displayName
        - nickname
        - isTopSpender
        - avatarUrl
        - registeredAt
    CreatorsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        page:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Current page number
        size:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of records returned in this response
        hasMore:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether there are more items available on subsequent pages
      required:
        - page
        - size
        - hasMore
    listCreators_Response_200:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: >-
              #/components/schemas/CreatorsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems
          description: Array of creators
        pagination:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/CreatorsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination
          description: Pagination information
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/creators"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript

  method: 'GET',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer <token>'}
};

  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
```

```go

	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/creators"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))
```

```ruby
require 'uri'

url = URI("https://api.fanvue.com/creators")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

```

```java
import com.mashape.unirest.http.HttpResponse;
import com.mashape.unirest.http.Unirest;

HttpResponse<String> response = Unirest.get("https://api.fanvue.com/creators")
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
  .header("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
  .asString();
```

```php
<?php
require_once('vendor/autoload.php');

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

$response = $client->request('GET', 'https://api.fanvue.com/creators', [
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version' => '2025-06-26',
  ],
]);

echo $response->getBody();
```

```csharp
using RestSharp;

var client = new RestClient("https://api.fanvue.com/creators");
var request = new RestRequest(Method.GET);
request.AddHeader("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26");
request.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer <token>");
IRestResponse response = client.Execute(request);
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/creators")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "GET"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# List team members

GET https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members

Get a list of all team members in the authenticated user's agency.

<Info>Scope required: `read:agency`</Info>
<Info>Requires: Agency admin access</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-team-members

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: List team members
  version: endpoint_.listTeamMembers
paths:
  /agencies/team-members:
    get:
      operationId: list-team-members
      summary: List team members
      description: |-
        Get a list of all team members in the authenticated user's agency.

        <Info>Scope required: `read:agency`</Info>
        <Info>Requires: Agency admin access</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of team members
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: >-
                    #/components/schemas/AgenciesTeamMembersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaItems
        '400':
          description: >-
            Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed OR
            invalid UUID
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
components:
  schemas:
    AgenciesTeamMembersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaItemsCreatorAccessItemsRole:
      type: string
      enum:
        - value: ADMIN
        - value: CHATTER
    AgenciesTeamMembersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaItemsCreatorAccessItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        role:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/AgenciesTeamMembersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaItemsCreatorAccessItemsRole
      required:
        - uuid
        - role
    AgenciesTeamMembersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        isAdmin:
          type: boolean
        nickname:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        displayName:
          type: string
        creatorAccess:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: >-
              #/components/schemas/AgenciesTeamMembersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaItemsCreatorAccessItems
      required:
        - uuid
        - isAdmin
        - nickname
        - email
        - displayName
        - creatorAccess

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript
const url = 'https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members';
const options = {
  method: 'GET',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer <token>'}
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```ruby
require 'uri'
require 'net/http'

url = URI("https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Get.new(url)
request["X-Fanvue-API-Version"] = '2025-06-26'
request["Authorization"] = 'Bearer <token>'

response = http.request(request)
puts response.read_body
```

```java
import com.mashape.unirest.http.HttpResponse;
import com.mashape.unirest.http.Unirest;

HttpResponse<String> response = Unirest.get("https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members")
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
  .header("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
  .asString();
```

```php
<?php
require_once('vendor/autoload.php');

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

$response = $client->request('GET', 'https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members', [
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version' => '2025-06-26',
  ],
]);

echo $response->getBody();
```

```csharp
using RestSharp;

var client = new RestClient("https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members");
var request = new RestRequest(Method.GET);
request.AddHeader("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26");
request.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer <token>");
IRestResponse response = client.Execute(request);
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "GET"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# Update team member

PUT https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/{userId}
Content-Type: application/json

Update a team member's properties such as admin status or nickname.

<Info>Scope required: `write:agency`</Info>
<Info>Requires: Agency admin access</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/update-team-member

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: Update team member
  version: endpoint_.updateTeamMember
paths:
  /agencies/team-members/{userId}:
    put:
      operationId: update-team-member
      summary: Update team member
      description: |-
        Update a team member's properties such as admin status or nickname.

        <Info>Scope required: `write:agency`</Info>
        <Info>Requires: Agency admin access</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: userId
          in: path
          description: Team member user UUID
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Team member updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/updateTeamMember_Response_200'
        '400':
          description: >-
            Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed OR
            invalid UUID
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '404':
          description: Not Found Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                nickname:
                  type:
                    - string
                    - 'null'
                  description: Nickname for the team member
                creatorUuids:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                    format: uuid
                  description: >-
                    Array of creator UUIDs that this team member should have
                    access to
components:
  schemas:
    AgenciesTeamMembersUserIdPutResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaCreatorAccessItemsRole:
      type: string
      enum:
        - value: ADMIN
        - value: CHATTER
    AgenciesTeamMembersUserIdPutResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaCreatorAccessItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        role:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/AgenciesTeamMembersUserIdPutResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaCreatorAccessItemsRole
      required:
        - uuid
        - role
    updateTeamMember_Response_200:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        isAdmin:
          type: boolean
        nickname:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        displayName:
          type: string
        creatorAccess:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: >-
              #/components/schemas/AgenciesTeamMembersUserIdPutResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaCreatorAccessItems
      required:
        - uuid
        - isAdmin
        - nickname
        - email
        - displayName
        - creatorAccess

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId"

payload = {}
headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

response = requests.put(url, json=payload, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript
const url = 'https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId';
const options = {
  method: 'PUT',
  headers: {
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26',
    Authorization: 'Bearer <token>',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
  },
  body: '{}'
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"strings"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId"

	payload := strings.NewReader("{}")

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("PUT", url, payload)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
	req.Header.Add("Content-Type", "application/json")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```ruby
require 'uri'
require 'net/http'

url = URI("https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Put.new(url)
request["X-Fanvue-API-Version"] = '2025-06-26'
request["Authorization"] = 'Bearer <token>'
request["Content-Type"] = 'application/json'
request.body = "{}"

response = http.request(request)
puts response.read_body
```

```java
import com.mashape.unirest.http.HttpResponse;
import com.mashape.unirest.http.Unirest;

HttpResponse<String> response = Unirest.put("https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId")
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
  .header("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
  .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
  .body("{}")
  .asString();
```

```php
<?php
require_once('vendor/autoload.php');

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

$response = $client->request('PUT', 'https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId', [
  'body' => '{}',
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',
    'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version' => '2025-06-26',
  ],
]);

echo $response->getBody();
```

```csharp
using RestSharp;

var client = new RestClient("https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId");
var request = new RestRequest(Method.PUT);
request.AddHeader("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26");
request.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer <token>");
request.AddHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
request.AddParameter("application/json", "{}", ParameterType.RequestBody);
IRestResponse response = client.Execute(request);
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>",
  "Content-Type": "application/json"
]
let parameters = [] as [String : Any]

let postData = JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: parameters, options: [])

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/agencies/team-members/userId")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "PUT"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers
request.httpBody = postData as Data

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# Get creator followers

GET https://api.fanvue.com/creators/{creatorUserUuid}/followers

Returns a paginated list of users who follow the specified creator.

    <Info>Scopes required: `read:creator`, `read:fan`</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-followers

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: Get creator followers
  version: endpoint_.listCreatorFollowers
paths:
  /creators/{creatorUserUuid}/followers:
    get:
      operationId: list-creator-followers
      summary: Get creator followers
      description: |-
        Returns a paginated list of users who follow the specified creator.

            <Info>Scopes required: `read:creator`, `read:fan`</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: creatorUserUuid
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: page
          in: query
          description: Page number to retrieve (starts from 1)
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 1
        - name: size
          in: query
          description: 'Number of items to return per page (1-50, default: 15)'
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 15
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of creator followers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/listCreatorFollowers_Response_200'
        '400':
          description: >-
            Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed OR
            invalid UUID
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '404':
          description: Not Found Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
components:
  schemas:
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidFollowersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        handle:
          type: string
        displayName:
          type: string
        nickname:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        isTopSpender:
          type: boolean
        avatarUrl:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        registeredAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
      required:
        - uuid
        - handle
        - displayName
        - nickname
        - isTopSpender
        - avatarUrl
        - registeredAt
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidFollowersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        page:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Current page number
        size:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of records returned in this response
        hasMore:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether there are more items available on subsequent pages
      required:
        - page
        - size
        - hasMore
    listCreatorFollowers_Response_200:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: >-
              #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidFollowersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems
          description: Array of followers
        pagination:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidFollowersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination
          description: Pagination information
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/followers"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript

const options = {
  method: 'GET',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer <token>'}
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/followers"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```ruby

http.use_ssl = true

request["X-Fanvue-API-Version"] = '2025-06-26'

```

```java
  .asString();
```

```php
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version' => '2025-06-26',
  ],
]);

echo $response->getBody();
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/followers")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "GET"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# Get creator subscribers

GET https://api.fanvue.com/creators/{creatorUserUuid}/subscribers

Returns a paginated list of users subscribed to the specified creator.

    <Info>Scopes required: `read:creator`, `read:fan`</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-subscribers

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: Get creator subscribers
  version: endpoint_.listCreatorSubscribers
paths:
  /creators/{creatorUserUuid}/subscribers:
    get:
      operationId: list-creator-subscribers
      summary: Get creator subscribers
      description: |-
        Returns a paginated list of users subscribed to the specified creator.

            <Info>Scopes required: `read:creator`, `read:fan`</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: creatorUserUuid
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: page
          in: query
          description: Page number to retrieve (starts from 1)
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 1
        - name: size
          in: query
          description: 'Number of items to return per page (1-50, default: 15)'
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 15
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of creator subscribers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/listCreatorSubscribers_Response_200'
        '400':
          description: >-
            Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed OR
            invalid UUID
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '404':
          description: Not Found Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
components:
  schemas:
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidSubscribersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        handle:
          type: string
        displayName:
          type: string
        nickname:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        isTopSpender:
          type: boolean
        avatarUrl:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        registeredAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
      required:
        - uuid
        - handle
        - displayName
        - nickname
        - isTopSpender
        - avatarUrl
        - registeredAt
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidSubscribersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        page:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Current page number
        size:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of records returned in this response
        hasMore:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether there are more items available on subsequent pages
      required:
        - page
        - size
        - hasMore
    listCreatorSubscribers_Response_200:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: >-
              #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidSubscribersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems
          description: Array of subscribers
        pagination:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidSubscribersGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination
          description: Pagination information
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript
const url = 'https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers';
const options = {
  method: 'GET',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer <token>'}
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```ruby
require 'uri'
require 'net/http'

url = URI("https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Get.new(url)
request["X-Fanvue-API-Version"] = '2025-06-26'
request["Authorization"] = 'Bearer <token>'

response = http.request(request)
puts response.read_body
```

```java
import com.mashape.unirest.http.HttpResponse;
import com.mashape.unirest.http.Unirest;

HttpResponse<String> response = Unirest.get("https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers")
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
  .header("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")
  .asString();
```

```php
<?php
require_once('vendor/autoload.php');

$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();

$response = $client->request('GET', 'https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers', [
  'headers' => [
    'Authorization' => 'Bearer <token>',
    'X-Fanvue-API-Version' => '2025-06-26',
  ],
]);

echo $response->getBody();
```

```csharp
using RestSharp;

var client = new RestClient("https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers");
var request = new RestRequest(Method.GET);
request.AddHeader("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26");
request.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer <token>");
IRestResponse response = client.Execute(request);
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/subscribers")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "GET"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```

# Get chats of a creator

GET https://api.fanvue.com/creators/{creatorUserUuid}/chats

Returns a paginated list of chats for the specified creator.

    <Info>Scopes required: `read:creator`, `read:chat`</Info>

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/agencies/list-creator-chats

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.1
info:
  title: Get chats of a creator
  version: endpoint_.listCreatorChats
paths:
  /creators/{creatorUserUuid}/chats:
    get:
      operationId: list-creator-chats
      summary: Get chats of a creator
      description: |-
        Returns a paginated list of chats for the specified creator.

            <Info>Scopes required: `read:creator`, `read:chat`</Info>
      tags:
        - []
      parameters:
        - name: creatorUserUuid
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: page
          in: query
          description: Page number to retrieve (starts from 1)
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 1
        - name: size
          in: query
          description: 'Number of items to return per page (1-50, default: 15)'
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
            default: 15
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: >-
            Bearer authentication of the form `Bearer <token>`, where token is
            your auth token.
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of creator chats
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/listCreatorChats_Response_200'
        '400':
          description: >-
            Bad Request - API version not supported OR validation failed OR
            invalid UUID
          content: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content: {}
        '404':
          description: Not Found Response
          content: {}
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content: {}
components:
  schemas:
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsUser:
      type: object
      properties:
        uuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        handle:
          type: string
        displayName:
          type: string
        nickname:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        isTopSpender:
          type: boolean
        avatarUrl:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        registeredAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
      required:
        - uuid
        - handle
        - displayName
        - nickname
        - isTopSpender
        - avatarUrl
        - registeredAt
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsLastMessageType:
      type: string
      enum:
        - value: AUTOMATED_CANCELED
        - value: AUTOMATED_NEW_FOLLOWER
        - value: AUTOMATED_NEW_PURCHASE
        - value: AUTOMATED_NEW_SUBSCRIBER
        - value: AUTOMATED_RE_SUBSCRIBED
        - value: AUTOMATED_RENEWED
        - value: CHAT_TEXT_GENERATION
        - value: CHAT_TEXT_REPLY
        - value: CHAT_TEXT_REWRITE
        - value: SINGLE_RECIPIENT
        - value: TIP
        - value: VOICE_CALL
        - value: BROADCAST
        - value: GHOST_PROMOTION
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsLastMessageMediaType:
      type: string
      enum:
        - value: image
        - value: video
        - value: audio
        - value: document
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsLastMessage:
      type: object
      properties:
        text:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
        type:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsLastMessageType
        uuid:
          type: string
        sentAt:
          type: string
          format: date
        hasMedia:
          type:
            - boolean
            - 'null'
        mediaType:
          oneOf:
            - $ref: >-
                #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsLastMessageMediaType
            - type: 'null'
        senderUuid:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        sentByUserId:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
          format: uuid
          description: >-
            UUID of the team member who sent the message on behalf of the
            creator, or null if sent directly by the creator
      required:
        - text
        - type
        - uuid
        - sentAt
        - hasMedia
        - mediaType
        - senderUuid
        - sentByUserId
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems:
      type: object
      properties:
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date
        lastMessageAt:
          type:
            - string
            - 'null'
          format: date
          description: Date of the last message in this chat
        isRead:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether the chat is marked as read (true) or unread (false)
        isMuted:
          type: boolean
        unreadMessagesCount:
          type: number
          format: double
        user:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsUser
        lastMessage:
          oneOf:
            - $ref: >-
                #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItemsLastMessage
            - type: 'null'
      required:
        - createdAt
        - lastMessageAt
        - isRead
        - isMuted
        - unreadMessagesCount
        - user
        - lastMessage
    CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        page:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Current page number
        size:
          type: number
          format: double
          description: Number of records returned in this response
        hasMore:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether there are more items available on subsequent pages
      required:
        - page
        - size
        - hasMore
    listCreatorChats_Response_200:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: >-
              #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaDataItems
          description: Array of chats
        pagination:
          $ref: >-
            #/components/schemas/CreatorsCreatorUserUuidChatsGetResponsesContentApplicationJsonSchemaPagination
          description: Pagination information
      required:
        - data
        - pagination

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/chats"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript

  method: 'GET',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer <token>'}
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/chats"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer <token>")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```java
  .header("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")

  .asString();
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/creators/creatorUserUuid/chats")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
```
